title: Arctic Climate Change Research
description: Understanding the accelerated rate of Arctic climate change and its cascading effects on ecosystems, communities, and global climate systems. The Arctic is warming at two to four times the global average rate, making research in this area a critical national priority.

objectives.title: Sea Ice Extent and Thickness Monitoring
objectives.description: Monitor and model long-term trends in sea ice extent, thickness, and seasonal variability to improve climate projections and support navigation safety.
objectives.leadAgency: National Snow and Ice Data Center (NSIDC)

objectives.title: Permafrost Thaw and Carbon Release
objectives.description: Assess the rate of permafrost thaw across the Arctic and quantify greenhouse gas emissions from thawing permafrost to improve global carbon budget estimates.

relevantLegislation.name: Arctic Research and Policy Act of 1984
National Climate Adaptation and Resilience Strategy
